overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from a cinematic video game (resembling Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a character walking through a snowy, foggy wilderness at night. The character traverses deep snow alongside a partially frozen stream, moving through a forested mountain valley with low visibility due to mist and darkness, accompanied briefly by a horse at the beginning.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snowy riverbank with scattered evergreens

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through deep snow alongside a stream, wearing heavy winter clothing and carrying a rifle on their back

notable_agents.action: horse walking parallel to the character initially, then veering left and exiting the frame within the first few seconds

entered.detail: deep snow covering the path with visible footprints trailing behind the character
partially frozen stream with dark water visible, running parallel to the path on the left
snow-covered rocky hillside rising steeply on the right side of the path
tall evergreen pine trees scattered across the snowy landscape in the distance
leafless bushes and twigs protruding from the snow in the foreground

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a character walking through a snowy wilderness at night, accompanied briefly by a horse that exits to the left. The path runs alongside a partially frozen stream with a rocky slope rising on the right. Sparse pine trees dot the foggy landscape as the character leaves footprints in the deep snow.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested snow trail with dense evergreens

events.description: path becomes more enclosed as evergreen trees close in on both sides, creating a corridor effect

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk through deeper snow, navigating between trees as the path narrows

segments.scene_description: The character moves into a more forested area where pine trees close in on both sides, creating a semi-enclosed corridor. The stream remains visible but further to the left, while the rocky slope on the right draws nearer. The snow appears deeper here, and the atmosphere remains foggy and dark.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky stream bank with shallow water crossing

events.description: character reaches the stream bank and transitions from snow to rocky terrain along the water's edge

agents.ego_description: carefully walking along the rocky stream bank, navigating around boulders and shallow water

entered.detail: large snow-dusted boulders and rocks lining the stream bank

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the stream bank and walks along the rocky water's edge, navigating around large boulders. The terrain shifts from snow-covered path to gravel and rock as the stream draws very close on the left. Snow-covered hills become visible in the distance ahead as the character continues through the foggy night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark, snowy wilderness that transitions from an open valley into a dense forest and finally toward a rocky stream bank. It begins with a character walking through deep snow alongside a partially frozen stream, while a horse briefly accompanies them before exiting to the left. As the character advances, the landscape narrows into a semi-enclosed corridor of pine trees that close in from both sides, pressing the rocky slope closer on the right. The scene then shifts as the character reaches the water's edge, moving from the snowy path onto gravel and rock to navigate around large boulders. Finally, the camera follows the character along the immediate bank of the stream, revealing distant snow-covered hills emerging through the persistent night fog.
